architecture.summary: NeuRAG unifies retrieval and reasoning in RAG by encoding each document as a lightweight LoRA module (knowledge neuron). During inference, a Hyper-Layer dynamically activates and fuses these neurons via an attention mechanism conditioned on input hidden states, enabling the model to jointly retrieve and reason within a single forward pass. Retrieved knowledge is integrated as dynamic parameter reconfiguration rather than static prepended context.
trained_components: LoRA modules for each document (knowledge neurons)
Hyper-Layer attention mechanism for neuron selection and fusion

biblio.title: NeuRAG: End-to-End Neural Knowledge Augmentation via Hyper-Neurons

claims.statement: NeuRAG demonstrates strong and consistent performance as a promising novel RAG paradigm across multiple datasets and LLMs
End-to-end Neuralized RAG framework enables the model to jointly retrieve and reason within a single forward pass, seamlessly integrating external knowledge into its inference pathway
Framing retrieval as dynamic reconfiguration of the model's parameter space rather than static context augmentation enables deep integration of knowledge into the model's parametric reasoning
